price: Vielleicht werden wir den Zauberern folgen, wenn sie es sind, die siegen.
arabic: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبِينَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: laʿallanā nattabiʿu al-saḥarata in kānū humu al-ghālibīna
